options.name: -hinst
options.description: Specifies the name of partition clone hierarchical instance

options.name: -location
options.description: Specifies location of the clone partition

options.name: -orient
options.description: Specifies orientation of the clone partition

options.name: -skip_sync
options.description: Skips sync from ref hinst to target hinsts

options.name: -sync_objs
options.description: Specifies objects to be synced from reference hinst. {placeBlockage routeBlockage pinBlockage macros fences}
